---
title: 'How to Protect You and Your Family in the Last Days, with Rick Renner and Kenneth Copeland!'
date: '2012-02-16T04:10:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8837505963195270802'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/how-to-protect-you-and-your-family-in_15.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br />How could I put into words and notes all that was said by Rick Renner on Sunday Morning. It would take a long time to write it all down. I have pages and pages of notes. Let's see if I can highlight some things. Either way, you NEED to watch the second service especially, but both are worth watching, maybe with the pause button and note pad ready?<br /><br /><a href="http://emic.org/on_demand.php" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">http://emic.org/on_demand.php</a><br /><br /><table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="table_sermons" style="-webkit-border-horizontal-spacing: 0px; -webkit-border-vertical-spacing: 0px; background-color: white; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-collapse: collapse; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 1.1em; margin-bottom: 24px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 8px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 635px;"><tbody style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><tr style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><td style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><strong><span style="font-size: small;">Sunday 9:00 AM | How to Protect You and Your Family in the Last Days</span></strong></td><td style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-size: small;">Pastor Rick Renner</span></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-size: small;">02/12/12</span></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_watch" href="http://emic.org/on_demand.php" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: 0px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"></a></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_listen" href="http://download.emicmedia.org/emic_en_services/2012-02-12-Sun-900-m.mp4" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: -15px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"><span style="font-size: small;">buy</span></a></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_listen" href="http://download.emicmedia.org/emic_en_services/2012-02-12-Sun-900-m.mp3" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: -15px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"></a></td></tr><tr style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><td style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><strong><span style="font-size: small;">Sunday 11:00 AM | How to Protect You and Your Family in the Last Days</span></strong></td><td style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-size: small;">Pastor Rick Renner and Kenneth Copeland</span></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-size: small;">02/12/12</span></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_watch" href="http://emic.org/on_demand.php" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: 0px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"></a></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_listen" href="http://download.emicmedia.org/emic_en_services/2012-02-12-Sun-1100-m.mp4" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: -15px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"><span style="font-size: small;">buy</span></a></td><td align="center" style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><a class="icon_listen" href="http://download.emicmedia.org/emic_en_services/2012-02-12-Sun-1100-m.mp3" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: transparent; background-image: url(http://emic.org/images/media/icons_watch_listen_buy.jpg); background-origin: initial; background-position: -15px 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #23627d; display: block; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; text-indent: -9999px; vertical-align: baseline; width: 15px;"></a></td></tr><tr style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;"><td style="border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-style: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; outline-color: initial; outline-style: initial; outline-width: 0px; padding-bottom: 6px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 6px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;"><br /></td></tr></tbody></table><div style="text-align: center;"><b>Last Days!</b></div><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/2-timothy/3.html" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">2 Timothy 3</a></b><br />1 But<b>&nbsp;know this</b>, that in the<b>&nbsp;last days perilous&nbsp;</b>times will come: 2 For men will be lovers of themselves, lovers of money, boasters, proud, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy, 3 unloving, unforgiving, slanderers, without self-control, brutal, despisers of good, 4 traitors, headstrong, haughty, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God, 5 having a form of godliness but denying its power. And from such people turn away! 6 For of this sort are those who creep into households and make captives of gullible women loaded down with sins, led away by various lusts, 7 always learning and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth. 8 Now as Jannes and Jambres resisted Moses, so do these also resist the truth: men of corrupt minds, disapproved concerning the faith; 9 but they will progress no further, for their folly will be manifest to all, as theirs also was. 10 But you have carefully followed my doctrine, manner of life, purpose, faith, longsuffering, love, perseverance, 11 persecutions, afflictions, which happened to me at Antioch, at Iconium, at Lystra--what persecutions I endured. And out of them all the Lord delivered me. 12 Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution. 13 But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived. 14 But you must continue in the things which you have learned and been assured of, knowing from whom you have learned them, 15 and that from childhood you have known the Holy Scriptures, which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith which is in Christ Jesus. 16 All Scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, for instruction in righteousness, 17 that the man of God may be complete, thoroughly equipped for every good work. Timothy was the pastor of Ephesus, which was the darkest, most sinful, city in all of the known world at that time. There were thousands of statues/idols of generals and&nbsp;Greek&nbsp;gods and demigods. They were not&nbsp;marble white as we see them today, most were flesh colored, so they would be the ancient&nbsp;equivalent&nbsp;to pornography on the streets of the city.&nbsp;&nbsp;Many of the members of the church would have been from the slave&nbsp;community&nbsp;and forced to endure commands by owners that&nbsp;contradicted&nbsp;their now born again conscience.<br /><br /><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/2-timothy/4.html" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">2 Timothy 4</a></b><br />1 I charge you therefore before God and the Lord Jesus Christ, who will judge the living and the dead at His appearing and His kingdom: 2&nbsp;<b>Preach the word!</b>&nbsp;Be ready in season and out of season. Convince, rebuke, exhort, with all longsuffering and teaching.<br /><br />"Know this..." is the Greek word&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/ginosko.html" target="_blank">Gnosis/Ginosko&nbsp;</a>which means to know for sure without doubt, it's a strong word.<br /><br />"Last Days..." is the Greek word&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/eschatos.html" target="_blank">Eschatos</a>&nbsp;which means last of the last. Last day of a month, last month of a year, not the last half but the LAST.<br /><br />"Perilous" &nbsp;is the Greek word&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/chalepos.html" target="_blank">Chalepos&nbsp;</a>which means exceedingly fierce. (Dangerous, Perilous, High Risk).<br /><br />The only way to properly define a word is to let scripture interpret scripture.&nbsp;The only other place you find this word in the New Testament is referring to the madman of the Gadarenes.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/bible/passage.aspx?q=mt+8:28&amp;t=kjv" target="_blank"><b>Matthew 8:28</b></a><br />28And when he was come to the other side into the country of the Gergesenes, there met him two possessed with devils , coming out of the tombs, exceeding&nbsp;<b><u>fierce</u></b>, so that no man might pass by that way.<br /><br />So if we take a look at the things surrounding this entry of the word, we can see somethings that apply to the last days today, it's still the same devil doing the same things. Here are some words that stand out from the account of the madman taken from Matthew, Mark, and Luke, and what they refer to or mean for us today.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>CHALEPOS the Last Days and Us:</b></div><br /><ul><li>Tombs - Death (Modern Preoccupation with Death, Goth, vampires, Ghosts, etc)</li><li>Unclean Spirit (Always refers to a spirit of sexual&nbsp;uncleanness)</li><li>Untamable - Unable to bring into order or proper behavior, in all realms</li><li>Cutting himself - Self Mutulation</li><li>Naked - Nudity and Dishonoring the Body</li><li>Restlessness</li><li>Insanity</li><li>Driven to the wilderness and&nbsp;cemetery- there is something driving people to evil</li></ul><br />There is a preoccupation with death,&nbsp;vampires, ghosts, etc in&nbsp;today's&nbsp;world. Goth started as a fad, but there are whole stores now that cater to it. Movies about vampires, ghosts, dead people, witches, psychics, etc... These are point to this preoccupation with death. The mad man had the spirit of sexual uncleanness which drove him to be nude and they could not keep him clothed. He may vary well have opened the door to his condition through sexual things. This generation is&nbsp;obsessed&nbsp;with sex. Regular TV during prime time showing shows with people trying to get into&nbsp;each others&nbsp;beds. The Supreme Court ruled that it was free speech and allowed cable to produce shows during kid watching hours that promote sex, violence, and cussing. The land has become untamable. There is a "new"&nbsp;phenomena&nbsp;that has hit so hard that large numbers of Christian girls at Christian private colleges are cutting themselves to&nbsp;relieve&nbsp;pressure and stress. People everywhere are restless and taking anxiety pills. There is even a new condition for restless leg&nbsp;syndrome. These are all signs of a fierce and dangerous time!<br /><br />Back to 2 Tim 3:2, The words "Shall Be" come from the word Eimi which is I AM, all about self and me, me , me generation. Lovers of Self is from two words that don't belong together:<br /><br />Philautos - Phileo (Love toward others, intimate, like a kiss) and Auto(where we get automatic, toward self) They will take love meant for others and love themselves highest of all.<br /><br />This generation will be thankless, they used to acknowledge God and chose to remove Him, forcefully, from their minds and&nbsp;society. Lack of&nbsp;thankfulness&nbsp;toward God will lead to sinful lifestyle. If you reject God your heart is darkened? What does a heart do? It pumps blood throughout the whole body. So if a societies heart is darkened it pumps sin and death into the whole society, and that's what is happening now to the USA, and the world. They proclaim to be wise/enlightened/better informed and become morons.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>Showdown!</b></div>Ultimately there will come a moment when it's all exposed. It will be in the same likeness of the exposure of&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jannes_and_Jambres" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Jannes and Jambres</a>&nbsp;with Moses. These names are only recorded in the book of 2 Timothy. Writings outside of the Bible record for us in history that these are the names of the two famous sorcerers&nbsp;who challenged Moses before&nbsp;Pharaoh. Moses threw down his staff and it became a&nbsp;serpent. Highly revered by the&nbsp;Egyptians. So the two magicians threw theirs down and did the same. But Moses ate theirs and then he took it up and it became a staff again. So God used their game and showed himself victorious. So likewise today, in this era, there will be a showdown of the powers that be. Also likewise we will be likely outmatched by as much as two to one. But God's power will reign victorious! There are dark days ahead, but there is light in the land of Goshen! An Exodus from Eygpt type experience is coming, a &nbsp;throw down... a battle of powers like that of Elijah and the Prophets of Baal on the hilltop.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>The Balloon!&nbsp;... I AM A BALLOON!&nbsp;</b></div>So Pastor George comes up and takes a balloon. It is flat and&nbsp;shapeless. He begins to blow some, and it takes some form. More air, more form. Until eventually it is a full balloon and he ties a&nbsp;knot&nbsp;on the end.<br /><br />So it is with the Word of God. All scripture is God Breathed, THEOPNUESTOS. It was God's air that gave light to the darkened earth, and life to a lifeless Adam! It was God's air that gave the Word shape. He breathed some revelation and we got the first give books of the bible, and breathed again and we got some more.&nbsp;Every time&nbsp;He breathed more came. &nbsp;Eventually He was done and He tied a knot on the end and called it The Word of God/Bible.<br /><br />If you take the balloon that Pastor breathed into... do you know what you would find? Air? Breath? You would find Pastor George! His DNA is all over the inside of that balloon. And so it is, that God's DNA is all over that Word of God and it is the very essence of what you are in your spirit as He breathed into you and your spirit was Born Again! We are a new creation! Any faith we have is God's faith. It's all Him! We faith with God faith!<br /><br /><div style="text-align: left;">Faith doesn't have issues with a house or car or money... the only thing that hinders faith is people! Believe Only! Jesus owns the planet now! It all belongs to Him, and you are His body! Get your image right! The past is paid for! Wash sin and past from you mind, it's gone!</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b>The&nbsp;Solution!</b></div><div style="text-align: left;">The answer to the darkness in 2 Tim 3 is found in 2 Tim 4. "Preach the Word!" Spend time in the word, not to teach it to others, but to feed your spirit. Only through feeding on the Word can you be strong and mighty in God. All lack of faith is rooted in a lack of time feeding on The Word.&nbsp;</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;">How often do I study, and study, but it's for information, for a book, for a blog, from a meeting... but it's not time spent eating the Word for myself. I must&nbsp;separate&nbsp;time in the Word for study, and time in the Word for spiritual food. There is a difference. The main difference is the time it takes to read, pray, and &nbsp;then shut up and listen what the Spirit would have you read and pray about. It's the time where the Word is speaking to YOU that makes all the difference!&nbsp;</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;">See more on this answer with my article:&nbsp;<a class="gs-title" href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2011/10/soak-scrub-rinse-and-repeat.html" rel="nofollow" style="background-color: white; cursor: pointer; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Helvetica, FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; height: 1.4em; line-height: 19px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden;" target="_blank"><b><span style="color: blue;">Soak, Scrub,&nbsp;Rinse, and Repeat</span></b></a></div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div>Darrell G. Wolfe<br /><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/FFkR2omHl2I" width="420"></iframe>
